narrative_summary: Occupancy held above 94% through March despite 3 evictions. Two concessions granted on renewals to retain long-tenured residents.
Collections tracking slightly below plan due to one legal-track case ($9,400) and a resident on approved payment plan ($3,200).
Strong month. Applied concession policy ceiling was not breached. Two lease buyouts processed to recapture below-market units.
Occupancy dipped after 4 unplanned move-outs in February carried into March. Marketing push initiated; tour-to-lease ratio improving.
Steady quarter. Renewal retention at 67% against 62% plan. Concessions applied on 2 market-rate leases to close pricing gap.
